summary: Supplier Certification Console (E2E Demo Panel) — ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 24/24 pytest tests passed. Frontend: Full UI verification complete with all features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: e2e_demo_service.py: Well-structured with 6 scenarios (success, price_mismatch, delayed_confirmation, booking_timeout, cancel_success, supplier_unavailable)
All 4 suppliers correctly defined in SUPPLIER_META: ratehawk, paximum, tbo, wtatil (wwtatil renamed to wtatil)
Certification scoring logic correct: score = (passed/total) * 100, go_live_eligible when score >= 80
Test results correctly persisted to MongoDB e2e_demo_tests collection
SupplierCertificationConsolePage.jsx: Complete UI with all data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test runs automatically persisted to MongoDB for history panel
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier Certification Console complete. 5 API endpoints under /api/e2e-demo/ (scenarios, run, history, rerun-step, suppliers). Frontend at /app/admin/certification-console. All supplier APIs are SIMULATED/MOCKED. wwtatil->wtatil rename verified in source files.

GET /api/e2e-demo/scenarios.details: Returns 6 scenarios: success, price_mismatch, delayed_confirmation, booking_timeout, cancel_success, supplier_unavailable

POST /api/e2e-demo/run.details: Runs E2E lifecycle test with 6 steps (search, detail, revalidation, booking, status_check, cancel). Returns steps[], certification{score, go_live_eligible, passed, failed, warnings, skipped}

GET /api/e2e-demo/history.details: Returns past test runs with supplier filter support

POST /api/e2e-demo/rerun-step.details: Reruns a single step from a previous test run

GET /api/e2e-demo/suppliers.details: Returns 4 suppliers (ratehawk, paximum, tbo, wtatil) with mode=simulation

Frontend: Certification Console Page.details: Page at /app/admin/certification-console loads correctly with title 'Supplier Certification Console'

Frontend: Supplier Selector.details: 4 supplier buttons: ratehawk, paximum, tbo, wtatil. WTatil correctly renamed from wwtatil

Frontend: Scenario Selector.details: 6 scenario buttons with descriptions and icons

Frontend: Run Test Button.details: Executes test and shows lifecycle stepper + certification card

Frontend: Lifecycle Stepper.details: Shows 6 steps with PASS/FAIL/WARN/SKIP badges, latency_ms, message

Frontend: Step Detail Drawer.details: Opens on step click. Shows latency, request_id, trace_id, supplier_response JSON, rerun button

Frontend: Certification Card.details: Shows score circle (100%/83%/0%), pass/fail/warn/skip counts, go-live badge

Frontend: History Tab.details: Shows past test runs with supplier filter buttons (Tümü, RateHawk, Paximum, TBO Holidays, WTatil)

Frontend: History Panel.details: List of test runs with supplier_name, scenario_name, mode, passed/total, score%, duration, timestamp

wwtatil->wtatil Rename.details: Verified: No 'wwtatil' references in source files (/app/backend/app/, /app/frontend/src/). Build artifacts have stale cache which is expected.

Auth Required.details: All endpoints return 401/403/422 without authentication, requires admin/super_admin role

mocked_apis.note: All supplier APIs are in SIMULATION mode. E2E demo tests use simulated responses, no real API calls.

scenarios_tested.price_mismatch: Revalidation step WARN (+12% price drift), score=83%, go_live_eligible=true
scenarios_tested.delayed_confirmation: Status Polling step WARN (5 polling rounds), score=83%
scenarios_tested.booking_timeout: Booking step FAIL (30s timeout), remaining steps SKIPPED, score=50%
scenarios_tested.cancel_success: All 6 steps PASS (includes full cancellation), score=100%
scenarios_tested.supplier_unavailable: Search step FAIL (HTTP 503), all remaining steps SKIPPED, score=0%, go_live_eligible=false
